metadata.description: Deploys the Video RAG Accelerator infrastructure: Storage Account, Azure AI Services (Content Understanding), Azure OpenAI, Azure AI Search, Logic App with Event Grid trigger, managed identities, and RBAC role assignments.
Azure region for all resources. Must support Azure Content Understanding. See https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-services/content-understanding/language-region-support#region-support
Prefix for all resource names. Lowercase letters and numbers only.
Pricing tier for Azure AI Search.

When_a_resource_event_occurs.description: Triggers when a new blob is created in the uploadedvideocontent container.

Parse_trigger_body.description: Parse the Event Grid trigger payload to extract blob information.

varBlobInfo.description: Initialize variables for blob URL, blob name (filename), and container name extracted from the event data.

varDocumentId.description: Create a deterministic document ID from the blob URL using Base64 encoding.

Set_defaults.description: Configure Content Understanding defaults including model deployments and storage location.

Generate_SAS_Token.description: Generate a read-only SAS token (1 hour expiry) for the blob container so Content Understanding can access the video.

Call_Content_Understanding.description: Start async video analysis using Content Understanding prebuilt-videoSearch analyzer with SAS token for blob access.

Parse_CU_Body.description: Parse the initial Content Understanding response.

varPollingInfo.description: Store the Operation-Location header URL for polling and initialize status tracking variable.

Check_Status.description: Poll the operation location URL to check analysis status.

Until_succeeded.description: Poll Content Understanding every 15 seconds until analysis succeeds or fails.

Terminate_Failed.description: Terminate workflow if Content Understanding analysis failed.

Parse_Call_Result_JSON.description: Parse the final Content Understanding result with full schema.

varContentText.description: Initialize variables to accumulate transcript and summary text from video segments.

Append_Summary.description: Append AI-generated summary for this video segment.

Select_Phrases.description: Extract text from each transcript phrase.

Append_Transcript.description: Join transcript phrases and append to full transcript.

For_each_content.description: Iterate through each content segment to extract transcripts and summaries.

Compose_Search_Content.description: Combine summary and transcript, limited to 8000 characters.

Generate_Embedding.description: Generate vector embedding using Azure OpenAI text-embedding-3-large.

Get_Search_Key.description: Retrieve AI Search admin key from Key Vault using managed identity.

Push_To_AI_Search.description: Push document with vector embedding to AI Search.

Terminate_No_Content.description: Terminate if no transcript content was extracted.

Condition_Has_Content.description: Check if transcript content was extracted before generating embeddings.
